---
title: reproducible-toolchain
description: Anatomy of a modular toolchain for reproducible bioinformatics workflows
author: Kelly Sovacool, Samarth Mathur, Vishal Koparde, Parthav Jailwala
format: 
    gfm
---

## Asbract

{{< include abstract/_repro-2026.txt >}}

## Diagram

![](img/diagram.svg)
